company: Accuris (formerly S&P Global Engineering Solutions / IHS Markit)
role: Program Manager, NPI (New Product Introduction) — Remote (USA)

confirmation_evidence: Success page: 'Congratulations, your application has been submitted. The confirmation number is ZEAWYkbS.' Blue check, page title 'Success | Dayforce Jobs', url /apply/success. Screenshot _16_CONFIRMATION.png — visually verified by orchestrator.
sponsorship_note: No 'no sponsorship' clause anywhere in the JD. Standard EEO statement only, no U.S.-Person/ITAR/clearance language. SAFE. Work-auth question answered Yes; legal-right-to-work free text disclosed H-1B + sponsorship-transfer requirement truthfully.
scope_fit_note: Honest STRETCH on domain: role wants SaaS NPI / go-to-market / commercialization launch experience; Jamie's end-to-end launch experience is educational/enablement programs, not SaaS product NPI. Execution spine (own full lifecycle intake->post-launch, recurring ceremonies, action/decision logs, cross-functional coordination Marketing/Legal/CX/Eng/Sales, exec-facing status, risk escalation, multiple concurrent programs) maps WELL to her InGenius work. Gap disclosed honestly in cover + Q3 'additional info' answer. 3+ yrs SaaS/B2B PM bar: ~3 yrs, MEETS.
resume_source: Freshly rebuilt this run (outputs/2026-06-13-deep/applications/accuris_npi_pm/resume.json). Operations/PM role-type tailoring: 'Strategic Program Manager' summary, InGenius title 'Program Manager, Enablement', Set-F bullets (end-to-end lifecycles, SOPs, digital resource library, webinar platforms), ODN Pair B (diagnostic), HRCI dropped, PM-tools skills. NO content thinning; rendered 1 page at autofit scale 0.97. Replaces the OLD pre-built runs/2026-05-29 resume that the prior staging used.
cover_gate_result: scan_cover() -> 0 flags. No banned facts, no claimed-experience for things Jamie lacks; NPI/product-launch framed as the role's work + her aspiration, never her track record.
resume_upload_method: CDP set_input_files on #jobPostingApplication_files_resume (the method that was BLOCKED via MCP sandbox in the prior staging — now works). Dayforce 'Your file was imported' banner + auto-parsed contact/education. Cover via #jobPostingApplication_files_coverLetter.

fields_filled_truthfully.education: Auto-parsed from resume: BA Psychology & Education Studies (Wesleyan) + MS Applied Organizational Psychology (USC). A stray mis-parsed 3rd entry (Degree=Master's, Not-Completed checked, Major=Capstone) was Cancelled — the two correct degree cards remain.

questionnaire_answers.desired_base_salary: Open / negotiable within the posted $90,000-$120,000 range (free text; truthful open framing anchored to posted band)
questionnaire_answers.current_legal_right_to_work: I hold a valid H-1B work visa and am authorized to work in the U.S. I would require H-1B sponsorship (a transfer to a new employer).
questionnaire_answers.skills_qualifying: End-to-end program management: own 20+ concurrent programs intake->launch, recurring cross-functional ceremonies, action/decision logs, exec-facing status reports, coordination across Marketing/Sales/Ops, risk escalation, PM tracking tools.
questionnaire_answers.additional_info: Disclosed that launch experience to date is educational/enablement programs not SaaS NPI specifically; eager to grow into NPI/GTM; MS Applied Org Psych; data-driven organized approach.
questionnaire_answers.disability_self_id: No, I do not have a disability and have not had one in the past
questionnaire_answers.veteran_status: I am not a protected veteran
